phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest tram stop is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'arrêt de tram le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah-RAY duh TRAM luh plew PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Strasbourg's tram system is efficient and covers most of the city center and surroundings.

responses.english: Right there, on the square. The Homme de Fer station.
responses.phonetic: zhoost LAH, soor lah PLASS. lah stah-SYOHN om duh FAIR
responses.french: Juste là, sur la place. La station Homme de Fer.

phrases.text_local: Où est le Marché de Noël cette année ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh leh mar-SHAY duh noh-EL set ah-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: Strasbourg's Christkindelsmärik is one of Europe's oldest and largest Christmas markets. Over 300 stalls across the city.

responses.english: The big tree is here, on Place Kléber.
responses.phonetic: say tah day-SAHMBR, pahn-DAHN kah-truh suh-MEN
responses.french: Le grand sapin est ici, sur la place Kléber.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find public toilets nearby
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes les plus proches ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay twah-LET lay plew PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets in Strasbourg are often in shopping centers or near main squares.

responses.english: In the shopping center, just across the way.
responses.phonetic: dahn luh SAHN-truh koh-mair-SYAL, zhoost ahn FASS
responses.french: Dans le centre commercial, juste en face.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is near Place Kléber
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme près de la place Kléber ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh toor-EEZM pray duh lah PLAHS klay-BAIR
phrases.cultural_note: Place Kléber is the main square of Strasbourg, named after General Kléber who was born here in 1753. The Christmas market fills it every December.

responses.english: Very close, on Place de la Cathédrale.
responses.phonetic: too PRAY, plahs duh lah kah-tay-DRAL.
responses.french: Tout près, place de la Cathédrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tram lines stop at Place Kléber
phrases.text_local: Quelles lignes de tram s'arrêtent à Kléber ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel LEEN-yuh duh TRAM sah-RET ah klay-BAIR

responses.english: Lines A, D and F — it's the network hub.
responses.phonetic: lay LEEN-yuh AH, DAY ay EF — say luh NUH doo ray-ZOH.
responses.french: Les lignes A, D et F, c'est le nœud du réseau.
